description: List or accounts, medieval-era. The same word (aqlām?) is written multiple times with an elongated horizontal middle letter. Above the horizontal bar each entry has an Arabic word (نقله and حمزتها?) followd by a numeral.There is Hebrew literary text on verso. Requires further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
